user.title: Kokoro TTS Connection
user.description: Connect to your Kokoro TTS server. The integration will automatically discover available models and voices.

data.api_key: API Key (optional, leave default if not needed)

details.title: Kokoro TTS Configuration
details.description: Configure your TTS settings. Use the Voice Accent and Sex filters to narrow down the persona list, then select a persona.

reauth_confirm.title: Re-authenticate Kokoro TTS
reauth_confirm.description: The API key is no longer valid. Please enter a new API key.

error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect to the server - check the URL and that the server is running
error.timeout: Connection timed out - the server took too long to respond
error.ssl_error: SSL error - check your certificate settings
error.server_not_found: Server responded but the Kokoro API was not found - check the URL
error.server_error: Server returned an error - check the Kokoro service logs
error.auth_failed: Authentication failed - check your API key

abort.already_configured: This Kokoro TTS server is already configured

init.title: Kokoro TTS Options
init.description: Adjust default settings. Use the Voice Accent and Sex filters to narrow down the persona list, then select a persona.
